error_signature: 500 error with output indicating it can't resolve the table
title: Xano OAuth endpoint returns 500 error
symptom: When attempting to authenticate via Google OAuth, a 500 error occurs, indicating the user table cannot be resolved, despite users being created successfully.
not_this_if: No users are created in the user table
The error does not occur during the OAuth process
root_cause: The 500 error suggests that there is a misconfiguration in the Xano endpoint, possibly related to the user table being referenced incorrectly or an empty attribute in the request. This can happen if the endpoint is not properly set up to handle the OAuth flow.
fix_steps: Check the Xano endpoint configuration for the OAuth process
Ensure the user table is correctly referenced and not empty
Re-select the user table in the Xano settings if necessary
Test the endpoint again to see if the issue persists
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the user table reference in the Xano OAuth endpoint settings.
